Alarm management and editing functionalities for Pebble firmware, including detail views and scheduling.


## Files
- **[alarm_detail.c](alarm_detail.c.md)**: Implements the alarm detail window with menu options for editing, enabling, deleting, and snoozing alarms.
- **[alarm_detail.h](alarm_detail.h.md)**: Declares a function to display alarm details and handle alarm editing callbacks.
- **[alarm_editor.c](alarm_editor.c.md)**: Implements an alarm editor for creating and updating alarms with time and day selection features.
- **[alarm_editor.h](alarm_editor.h.md)**: Functions and types for creating and updating alarms in the Pebble firmware.
- **[alarms.c](alarms.c.md)**: Implements the Alarms app for Pebble firmware, managing alarm creation, editing, and scheduling.
- **[alarms.h](alarms.h.md)**: Declares a function to get information about the alarms application.
